about.metaDescription: Learn about {company}'s mission to transform education through innovative online consultation services.
about.heroDescription: Transforming education through innovative online consultation services that connect students, educators, and professionals in a secure environment.
about.missionText1: To democratize access to quality support and professional consultation services by leveraging cutting-edge technology while maintaining the highest standards of privacy, security, and compliance.
about.missionText2: We believe every student deserves access to personalized support that helps them achieve their full potential, regardless of geographic location or institutional resources.
about.visionText: To become the leading platform for consultation services, fostering a global community where learning has no boundaries and every challenge can be addressed through expert guidance and collaborative support.
about.story2020Text: Founded with a vision to bridge the gap between students and expert support during the global shift to remote learning.
about.story2022Text: Expanded our platform capabilities serving over 10,000 students across 200+ institutions.
about.story2025Text: Continuing to innovate with AI-powered matching, advanced analytics, and expanded global reach to serve the evolving needs of modern education.
about.valuesSubtitle: These principles guide every decision we make and every feature we build.
about.valuePrivacyDesc: We prioritize the protection of student data and maintain the highest security standards.
about.valueExcellenceDesc: We connect students with verified, qualified professionals who are passionate about education.
about.valueInnovationDesc: We continuously evolve our platform to meet the changing needs of modern education.
about.valueAccessibilityDesc: We ensure our platform is accessible to all users, regardless of ability or circumstance.
about.teamSubtitle: Passionate educators and technologists dedicated to transforming support services.
about.bioCEO: Former education administrator with 15+ years of experience in technology and student support services.
about.bioCTO: Technology leader with expertise in secure platform development and compliance standards.
about.bioCPO: Product strategist focused on user experience and outcomes, with a background in learning sciences and UX design.
about.impactSubtitle: Making a difference in education, one consultation at a time.
about.certificationsSubtitle: We maintain the highest standards of security, privacy, and compliance.
about.ctaDescription: Whether you're an educator looking to make a difference or a student seeking support, we invite you to be part of our growing community.

home.heroDescription: Connect with qualified professionals for expert consultation through secure video sessions. Get the guidance you need, when you need it.
home.secureVideoDesc: Professional consultations from the comfort of your home
home.whyChooseDesc: We provide a secure, convenient, and professional environment for online consultations
home.featureSecureDesc: End-to-end encrypted sessions ensuring your privacy and confidentiality are protected.
home.featureFlexibleDesc: Book appointments that fit your schedule with real-time availability updates.
home.featureQualifiedDesc: Access to verified experts across various specializations and fields.
home.howItWorksDesc: Get professional consultation in three simple steps
home.step1Desc: Browse our network of qualified professionals and select the right specialist for your needs.
home.step2Desc: Book your appointment at a convenient time that works for both you and your chosen professional.
home.step3Desc: Join your secure video session and receive professional consultation from the comfort of your location.
home.ctaDescription: Join thousands of clients who have already discovered the convenience and quality of online professional consultation.

contact.faqResponseTime: How quickly will I receive a response?
contact.faqResponseTimeAnswer: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. Urgent matters are typically addressed within 2-4 hours.
contact.faqSchedule: Can I schedule a consultation directly?
contact.faqScheduleAnswer: Yes! You can book consultations directly through our platform or contact us for assistance with scheduling.
contact.faqCost: Is there a cost for support?
contact.faqCostAnswer: All customer support is free. We're here to help you get the most out of our platform.

accessibility.title: Accessibility statement
accessibility.subtitle: Our commitment to digital inclusion
accessibility.intro: {company} is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility.commitmentText: We believe that access to education and professional consultation services should be available to everyone, regardless of ability. Our platform is designed and developed with accessibility as a core principle, not an afterthought.
accessibility.standardsText: Our website and platform aim to conform to the web content accessibility guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible for people with disabilities.
accessibility.perceivableDesc: Information and UI components must be presentable to users in ways they can perceive.
accessibility.operableDesc: User interface components and navigation must be operable by all users.
accessibility.understandableDesc: Information and the operation of user interface must be understandable.
visualItems: Scalable text (up to 200% without horizontal scrolling)
Color is not the only means of conveying information
motorItems: Reasonable time limits with extensions available
cognitiveItems: Error prevention and clear error messages
accessibility.assistiveTechText: Our platform is compatible with a wide range of assistive technologies:
accessibility.testingText: We regularly test our platform for accessibility compliance through:
testingItems: User testing with people with disabilities
accessibility.knownIssuesText: While we strive for full accessibility, we acknowledge some current limitations:
knownIssueItems: Some third-party video conferencing features may have limited accessibility
PDF documents may not always be fully accessible (we're working to improve this)
Some dynamic content updates may not be immediately announced to screen readers
accessibility.knownIssuesNote: We are actively working to address these issues in upcoming updates.
accessibility.supportText: If you experience any accessibility barriers while using our platform, we want to help. Our accessibility support team is available to assist you.
accessibility.feedbackText: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of our platform. Your input helps us identify areas for improvement and prioritize accessibility enhancements.
howToFeedbackItems: Submit through our general support channels
accessibility.trainingText: All {company} team members receive accessibility training to ensure they understand and can support users with disabilities. Our training program includes:
trainingItems: Customer service for people with disabilities
accessibility.legalText: Our accessibility efforts align with various legal requirements and standards, including:
accessibility.adaDesc: Ensuring equal access to public accommodations and services
accessibility.section508Desc: Federal accessibility standards for electronic content
accessibility.altFormatsText: We can provide information in alternative formats upon request:
altFormatItems: Sign language interpretation for video calls
accessibility.altFormatsNote: Please contact us at least 48 hours in advance to arrange alternative formats.
accessibility.updatesText: This accessibility statement is reviewed and updated regularly to reflect our current accessibility status. Last reviewed: {date}
accessibility.updatesCommitment: We are committed to continuing our accessibility improvements and will update this statement as we make enhancements to our platform.
